calendar.matters:
Hearing Re: Report Of Referee
Off Calendar Sep-06-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
This matter was called with Line 4 - Healtcare Technology Capital Partners, LLC vs. Janice Nicholson; Case No. CGC-16-555400.

Appearances:
Kathleen Sherman, Esq., 650.465.4940, appearing for the Healtcare Plaimtiffs/Parties;
J. Philip Martin, Esq. of Kastner Kim LLP, 650.967.7854, appearing for the Defendant Janice Nicholson;
John MacConaghy, Esq. of MacConaghy Barnier PLC, 707.935.3205, appearing for and with Referee Randy Sugarman.

HEARING RE: REPORT OF REFEREE.

The matter is called, no argument is held. Counsels report to the Court that the matters have settled. Orders signed in open court.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600, 415.551.5868, Email: torreanom@aol.com. =(302/HEK)

Hearing Re: Report Of Referee
Off Calendar Jul-26-2018 Continued To Sep-06-18 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Atty. Kathleen Sherman, Tel. No. 1-650-465-4940 appearing for the Plaintiff;
Atty. John H. MacConaghy of MacConaghy & Barnier, PLC, Tel. No. 1-707-935-3205
appearing for Referee Randy Sugarman;
Atty. Eric C. Kastner & J. Philip Martin of Kastner/Kim LLP, Tel. No. 1-650-967-7854
appearing for the Defendant Nicholson;
Atty. Thomas H. Carlson of Rogers Joseph O'Donnell, Tel. No. 1-415-365-5305 appearing for the Interested Party Jason Lupers;

RULING - The matter was discussed. Hearing Re: Report Of Referee is continued to September 6, 2018 at 1:30 p.m. The parties were ordered to see Ms.Pang Ly prior to September 6, 2018 for a possible settlement. The parties to prepare a stipulated order withdrawing from the court file all papers that are sought to be sealed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR# 8600 =302/hk

Hearing Re: Report Of Referee
Off Calendar Apr-19-2018 Continued To Jul-26-18 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Kathleen Sherman, Esq., T:650-465-4940 for Petitioner Healthcare Technology;
J. Philip Martin, Esq. of Kastner Kim LLP, T:650.967.7854 for Janice Nicholson [CGC-16-555400];
John H. MacConaghy, Esq. of MacConaghy & Barnier, PLC, T:707.935.3205, for Referee Randy Sugarman who is also present [CGC-16-555400].

RULING: The Court reviewed the referee's report and the objections thereto. Hearing was held concurrently with CGC-16-555400. After the hearing,

HEARING RE: REPORT OF REFEREE is CONTINUED for further hearing to July 26, 2018 at 1:30pm. Mr. Sugarman is to prepare another report and submit it no later than 3 days before the hearing. Counsel for Mr. Sugarman is to prepare and submit a proposed order.

In addition, the Court signed an Order Permitting Defendant/Cross-Complainant Janice Nicholson To File A Third Amended Complaint in the CGC-16-555400. Cross-defendant has 60 days to file a responsive pleading.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Laura A. Reding, CSR 711, email: lreding@sftc.org.
